programme.title: E46 - In Autun (1)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Autun, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in the town's cathedral and in its heritage.

programme.title: E9 - The Falquet Brothers, Snow Dreamers
programme.desc: Nicolas and Loris Falquet are at the cutting edge when it comes to freeriding. Directing and producing films about board sports, the brothers are as creative on skis as they are behind the camera. Originally from Lausanne, the brothers made Les Marecottes their playground some twenty years ago.

programme.title: E86
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: E5 - Community Spirit
programme.desc: Community spirit has always been important in farming. It is alive today, especially among the new generation which prefers a farming model that is based more on cooperation than competition.

programme.title: E13 - On The Trail Of La Fayette
programme.desc: Loic Ballet follows the trail of the Marquis de La Fayette and meets specialists of this famous historical figure.

programme.title: E46 - In Autun (1)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Autun, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in the town's cathedral and in its heritage.

programme.title: E86
programme.desc: The magazine programme all about the art of living in Monaco, Provence and on the Cote d'Azur.

programme.title: E11 - Long-Distance Hiking, In Search Of Happiness
programme.desc: The Cevennes, in the department of the Gard. Laurent Guillaume meets some of those for whom walking is a way to reconnect with themselves. An opportunity to explore this region in the south-eastern Massif Central, perfect for long-distance hiking but often subject to extreme weather conditions.

programme.desc: Flavie Flament goes to Autun, to the market, to meet its inhabitants. Today, she takes an interest in the town's armoury and in the region's sheep.

programme.title: E10 - Guznag, Drawing Naturally/Guardian Angel
programme.desc: An encounter with a talented Swiss illustrator, creator of an enchanting world sometimes strangely disquieting in its elaborate detail; before discovering the unusual story of a gentle shepherd, brought back to life by a guardian angel.

programme.desc: Discover how cool and refreshing frozen yogurt gets its dizzying layers of crunchy toffee and peanut butter swirl; the origin of crispy spring rolls and what really goes into plum sauce; Purdy's rich and gooey Sweet Georgia Browns get their mouthwatering salty sweet balance.

programme.title: E9 - Tiger Sharks
programme.desc: As the team prepare for their great hammerhead experience, Steve has one more dive he wants some of them to experience. He takes four of the divers out to the wreck of an old ship which, over the years, has been colonised by a myriad of marine life. The young divers enter an underwater world inhabited by stunning fish and ocean turtles.

programme.title: Closing Bell: Overtime
programme.desc: When the bell rings, the action does not end. “Closing Bell: Overtime” takes you through all of the after-hours moves including breaking news, corporate earnings and post-market trading. E108 - Big Help Croc / Pom Pom
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile volunteers to help too many friends with their projects all at the same time. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile invite a new friend, PomPom, to live with them.

programme.title: E404 - The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build!

programme.title: E403 - The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Experience
programme.desc: Sierra Sparkle calls in help from Rubble & Crew to build a special experience for all her fans in Builder Cove.

programme.title: E215 - The Crew Builds An Indoor Skydiving Center / The Crew Builds A Roller Rink
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway and Mr. Ducky-Doo want to show their skydiving skills. But when wind gets in the way, the pups help them sky dive on the ground! // When Wheeler and Truffles the pig can't ice skate, the crew finds a construction solution with wheels!

programme.title: E201 - Polly's Holiday
programme.desc: Granny and Grandpa's pet, Polly Parrot comes to stay. Peppa and George love Polly Parrot. She is very funny and repeats everything anyone says. When Polly flies away, no one knows how to get her back, until George comes up with a very clever plan.

programme.title: E304 - Pups Save Alex's Mini-Patrol / Pups Save A Lost Tooth
programme.desc: Impressed by the Paw Patrol's rescues, Alex sets up his own mini-Patrol, recruitng Chickaletta, Cali, Turtle, and Bunny. // Alex loses his first tooth, then really loses it.The tooth must be located before the Tooth Fairy comes!

programme.title: E404 - The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build!

programme.title: E403 - The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Experience
programme.desc: Sierra Sparkle calls in help from Rubble & Crew to build a special experience for all her fans in Builder Cove.

programme.title: E309 - The Crew Builds An Art Museum
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build the perfect place to show off River's ever-changing photography projects... Builder Cove's own art museum!

programme.title: E104 - Boots
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control.

programme.title: E210 - George's Friend
programme.desc: George and Rebecca Rabbit's little brother Richard each have a toy dinosaur but they are not very good at sharing their toys. Mummy Pig shows them that they can have much more fun at the playground if they play together, just like their big sisters.

programme.title: E211 - The Boat Pond
programme.desc: Peppa and her family and friends are playing at the pond with their toy boats. Everyone has a boat to play with except Rebecca Rabbit. Daddy Pig makes Rebecca a boat out of newspaper. Rebecca's paper boat is so nice; everyone wants one.

programme.title: E213 - The Time Capsule
programme.desc: Peppa and her school friends are making a time capsule. They each put one of their favourite things inside and bury it in the school garden. The children discover that their parents made a time capsule many years ago.

programme.title: E208 - Teddy's Day Out
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are having a picnic. Mr Zebra the Postman and Zoe Zebra are having a picnic too, so they decide to have one big picnic. When it's home time, Peppa leaves her teddy behind.

programme.title: E209 - Emily Elephant
programme.desc: There's a new pupil at the playgroup, Emily Elephant. Everybody wants to be her friend because she is very good at building blocks and can make a loud noise with her trunk.

programme.title: E113 - Zeg And The Egg
programme.desc: Zeg is out smashing things with Blaze and AJ when he finds a tiny dinosaur egg. Now the three friends must embark on an epic journey across a prehistoric landscape to return the egg to its Truckodactyl mother.

programme.title: E404 - The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build!

programme.title: E403 - The Crew Builds A Sierra Sparkle Experience
programme.desc: Sierra Sparkle calls in help from Rubble & Crew to build a special experience for all her fans in Builder Cove.

programme.title: E214 - Pups Save An Elephant Family / Pups And The Mischievous Kittens
programme.desc: The pups' road trip through the savanna becomes a mission to reunite and rescue an elephant family! // To win the Spotless Town award, the PAW Patrol pups must save Adventure Bay from Mayer Humdinger's Kitten Catastrophe Crew!

programme.title: E215 - Pups Save A Friend / Pups Save A Stowaway
programme.desc: When Marshall decides to take a break from the PAW Patrol, the pups jump into action to bring him back! // When the pups find a stowaway on their trip to the Icy Tundra, they must rescue a run-away kitty on a run-away Snow Cat!

programme.title: E104 - Tooth On The Loose / Scaredy Croc
programme.desc: When Mr. Crocodile loses a tooth, Daisy wants to make sure he gets a visit from the tooth fairy. // Mr. Crocodile, Daisy and their friends are scared to fetch Martin's gloves from his spooky shed.

programme.title: E404 - The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build!

programme.title: E815 - Muddy Festival
programme.desc: Peppa and her family sleep overnight in a tent and wake up to find the whole festival is covered in mud. Peppa is thrilled!

programme.title: E816 - Strawberries
programme.desc: Grandpa and Granny Pig have been growing strawberries to make jam, but the birds have eaten them all! Instead, they go with Peppa and George to Miss Rabbit's strawberry farm.

programme.title: E810 - Buttercups, Daisies And Dandelions
programme.desc: Cousin Chloe, Peppa and George are picking flowers, making daisy-chains and transforming George into a fearsome dandy-lion.

programme.title: E404 - The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build!

programme.title: E106 - Spaceland / New Rocket / Babysitting
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia get lost at a play centre. // Tim tries to find a new rocket that's perfect for him. // Tim tries to bend all the rules when Terri comes to babysit.

programme.title: E208 - Teddy's Day Out
programme.desc: Peppa and her family are having a picnic. Mr Zebra the Postman and Zoe Zebra are having a picnic too, so they decide to have one big picnic. When it's home time, Peppa leaves her teddy behind.

programme.title: E209 - Emily Elephant
programme.desc: There's a new pupil at the playgroup, Emily Elephant. Everybody wants to be her friend because she is very good at building blocks and can make a loud noise with her trunk.

programme.title: E210 - George's Friend
programme.desc: George and Rebecca Rabbit's little brother Richard each have a toy dinosaur but they are not very good at sharing their toys. Mummy Pig shows them that they can have much more fun at the playground if they play together, just like their big sisters.

programme.title: E211 - The Boat Pond
programme.desc: Peppa and her family and friends are playing at the pond with their toy boats. Everyone has a boat to play with except Rebecca Rabbit. Daddy Pig makes Rebecca a boat out of newspaper. Rebecca's paper boat is so nice; everyone wants one.

programme.title: E213 - The Time Capsule
programme.desc: Peppa and her school friends are making a time capsule. They each put one of their favourite things inside and bury it in the school garden. The children discover that their parents made a time capsule many years ago.

programme.title: E404 - The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build!

programme.title: E404 - The Crew Builds A Conveyor Belt Restaurant
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build!

programme.title: E108 - Big Help Croc / Pom Pom
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile volunteers to help too many friends with their projects all at the same time. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile invite a new friend, PomPom, to live with them.

E221 - Itti Si Khushi
programme.desc: An Indian adaptation of the acclaimed international series 'Shameless'. The plot centers around Anvita, the eldest sister, who looks after her five siblings as her father struggles with alcoholism.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 日本國稅局「米」課，是令逃稅者聞風喪膽的最終防線。在其內部，新設了一個原創部門——複雜國稅案件處理室「雜國室」。由米田正子（松嶋菜菜子 飾）領軍，集結一群身懷絕技的怪才，專門制裁最棘手難纏的惡德逃稅者，成為體系內獨特而強悍的制裁之刃。

programme.title: E6
programme.desc: 故事描述已經脫離工作職場長達7年，以實習生回歸的40多歲女性重投社會工作，在這個像叢林般危險的職場中堅持著、硬撐著生存下去的故事。

programme.title: E1
programme.desc: 當紅主播許妍（趙露思飾）和都會精英沈皓明（陳偉霆飾）是一對人人艷羨慕的夫妻，看似十分般配的兩人，由於出生環境的差異，始終難以融入對方的圈子。許妍靠著光鮮的主持人身分和「精心裝點」的身世順利和沈皓明步入婚姻，而這一切盡在沈皓明的掌握下。衝突來臨，許妍脫離沈皓明的掌控一去不回頭。沈皓明卻發現自己早已陷入愛情，想要全力追回許妍。經歷種種，兩人終於撕掉外表的偽裝，重新靠近，會見彼此的內在，也重新認識自己。

programme.title: E10 - Cape Town
programme.desc: Jack takes the classic roast beef and Yorkshire pudding to Cape Town. There, he meets a friend and they source seasonal summer veg and make a South African beef roast.

programme.title: E13 - Between a Truck and a Hard Place
programme.desc: Robin makes a difficult decision about his beloved mine truck 6-Pack after another expensive breakdown, while Claudia makes a desperate call for help to get their jade out of camp before winter shuts them down.

programme.title: E14 - Mutiny on the Mountain
programme.desc: With winter closing in, Claudia pushes her exhausted crew to their breaking point, causing tempers to flare and forcing Claudia to finally take one for the team.

programme.title: E1 - Highlights 1
programme.desc: Seven celebrities face a challenging expedition in the South African bush, where they must learn to navigate difficult terrain, build shelters, make fire and eat the food that nature provides. From being suspended by rope from a helicopter to eating mopane worms and navigating through scorched plains, the stars face a range of tough tasks and Bear himself eliminates one of them after each challenge. Actor Neil Morrissey, choreographer Jason Gardiner, women's footballer Alex Scott, actresses Michelle Collins and Chelsee Healey, West End star Samantha Barks and former footballer Stuart Pearce make up the team.

programme.title: E10 - Cape Town
programme.desc: Jack takes the classic roast beef and Yorkshire pudding to Cape Town. There, he meets a friend and they source seasonal summer veg and make a South African beef roast.

programme.title: E13 - Between a Truck and a Hard Place
programme.desc: Robin makes a difficult decision about his beloved mine truck 6-Pack after another expensive breakdown, while Claudia makes a desperate call for help to get their jade out of camp before winter shuts them down.

programme.title: E14 - Mutiny on the Mountain
programme.desc: With winter closing in, Claudia pushes her exhausted crew to their breaking point, causing tempers to flare and forcing Claudia to finally take one for the team.

programme.title: E1 - Highlights 1
programme.desc: Seven celebrities face a challenging expedition in the South African bush, where they must learn to navigate difficult terrain, build shelters, make fire and eat the food that nature provides. From being suspended by rope from a helicopter to eating mopane worms and navigating through scorched plains, the stars face a range of tough tasks and Bear himself eliminates one of them after each challenge. Actor Neil Morrissey, choreographer Jason Gardiner, women's footballer Alex Scott, actresses Michelle Collins and Chelsee Healey, West End star Samantha Barks and former footballer Stuart Pearce make up the team.

programme.title: E1 - Highlights 1
programme.desc: Seven celebrities face a challenging expedition in the South African bush, where they must learn to navigate difficult terrain, build shelters, make fire and eat the food that nature provides. From being suspended by rope from a helicopter to eating mopane worms and navigating through scorched plains, the stars face a range of tough tasks and Bear himself eliminates one of them after each challenge. Actor Neil Morrissey, choreographer Jason Gardiner, women's footballer Alex Scott, actresses Michelle Collins and Chelsee Healey, West End star Samantha Barks and former footballer Stuart Pearce make up the team.

programme.title: E1 - Mexico
programme.desc: On a wild and dangerous adventure to Mexico, BMX bikers Rooftop and Catfish test how gutsy they really are. The pair go from racing bikes to racing donkeys, flame throwing and tricking in pointy shoes on the streets, to loosing their breakfast trying to eat eyeball tacos for lunch. But the duo’s bravery (or stupidity) doesn’t end there. They compete in a rodeo, milk a snake for its venom, spin upside down as Voladores in a traditional rain ceremony, and get tattoos right before diving into the city’s toxic sewage. With all of these dauntless activities the question becomes, can Rooftop and Catfish make it out of Mexico in one piece?

programme.title: E4 - Schooled by a Girl Scout
programme.desc: When a 13-year-old girl scout needs help earning a primitive camping skills badge, Bear Grylls flies to the rescue… literally. Beth’s wisdom for life and the outdoors is beyond her years, but nothing can prepare her for what challenges bear has in store for this adventure.

programme.title: LPGA 2026 MEXICO Riviera Maya Open at Mayakoba -Day 3
E19
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: 在福建小島漁村長大的段宇成夢想成為一名跳高運動員，在助教羅娜的循序善誘之下，不僅訓練成績突飛猛進，兩人也在朝夕相處過程中情愫悄悄滋生，最終段宇成突破了極限也同時收穫了和羅娜的真摯愛情。

programme.title: E19
programme.desc: 潘岩(郭麒麟 飾)在機緣巧合下進入榮柯律所實習，認識了高冷女神左娜(金晨 飾)、學霸舒一南(晏紫東 飾)等一批年輕人。他們在資深前輩易帆(朱珠飾)、杜飛宇(張子賢飾)等人的帶領下，經歷了職場的波折坎坷和困難考驗，一起並肩作戰，互相學習成長，憑著熱情拼搏的職場精神，在情與法、義與利的境地裡突圍，更堅定了對法律的崇高信仰，同時也對自身的突破與飛躍有了新的認識與感悟，於職場和生活的路上守望初心，在平凡中創造不凡的「奮逗」故事。

programme.title: E22
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.desc: Sayali desires a fairytale romance, but fate intertwines her with Sachin, a complex figure. Will her dreams of a perfect life survive this unexpected connection?

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: Hiiragi Kanade (Fukuchi Momoko) arrives in Noto as a volunteer and unexpectedly ends up launching a community radio station with the local residents. But there's no experience, no budget, and no studio - only a shared desire to bring light back to a town hurt by earthquakes and torrential rain. Once the broadcast begins, there's no turning back. A nonstop entertainment drama where ordinary citizens find themselves becoming stars.

programme.title: Bouncing and Bending Light
programme.desc: What is the difference between reflection and refraction? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of light. Have hands-on fun by mixing oil and water, and get to know Zhang Heng, a great polymath, who figured out the Moon reflects light like a mirror.

programme.title: Doki's Dolphin
programme.desc: Fico has decided that the ideal pet for him is a dolphin. At first, everyone finds this ridiculous, but then gets excited. The team flies to the coast of Australia to find one. After all, why can't Fico have a dolphin?

programme.title: Alan Silva: Aerial Skills Artist
programme.desc: Alan Silva holds the GUINNESS WORLD RECORDS title for the most 360-degree spins while hanging upside down from aerial straps in one minute. Alan Pixsley meets Alan Silva and learns about how to keep a pretty posture and look graceful during a performance.

programme.title: The Power Up 1000
programme.desc: The hosts discover a product called the “Power Up1000” and are certain it can boost their channel. Are some products too good to be true?

programme.title: A Machine Which Can Read Your Mind
programme.desc: Researchers have developed brain-computer interfaces that allow disabled patients to control devices and programmes by mere thought. Through electrodes that are placed on the scalp, user intentions are transformed into electronic commands.

programme.title: New Beginnings
programme.desc: Figure skaters Josh and Kloe must pull out all the stops to impress a royal visitor. There is also another very special person making a return to the rink, and ice dancer Ella has just days to get herself ready for her first-ever solo performance.

programme.title: Fearing The Unknown
programme.desc: Our two rising stars from Birmingham - Seb and Shakiem - are preparing and mastering new skills for the Tumbling British Championships. Meanwhile, Finn and Kirsten are busy training for the Acrobatic British Championships.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: New Beginnings
programme.desc: Figure skaters Josh and Kloe must pull out all the stops to impress a royal visitor. There is also another very special person making a return to the rink, and ice dancer Ella has just days to get herself ready for her first-ever solo performance.

programme.title: Star Catchers
programme.desc: Darwin and Newts learn about star constellations when they go on a night time adventure with Wapiti and the other creatures.

programme.title: The Recycling Bandit
programme.desc: Addison and her friends are distracted from their mission of making cool costumes for Ayrton Park's version of Comicon when someone or something starts messing with recycling bins all over the neighbourhood.

programme.title: The Aral Sea
programme.desc: Kit is rusting in the toxic desert of the former Aral Sea.

programme.title: Water in the City
programme.desc: Mr. Battery is flushed into the city's water pipeline and wastewater system.

programme.title: Multiple applications of Magnets
programme.desc: How did people know where they were heading before GPS? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of magnetism. Have hands-on fun by constructing your own compass, and get to know An Wang, a computer engineer who revolutionised magnetic core memory.

programme.title: Ebb and the New Boat
programme.desc: A new boat arrives and Bird makes a new friend Zoot, a tiny yellow canary who lives on the boat. They become inseparable. Grrrr. Then, one day, the new boat is gone along with Zoot. Bird pines. Ebb and Flo create a little gift to cheer Bird up.

programme.title: Butterfly Feet
programme.desc: Luna, Jupiter, and Clyde follow a butterfly through the garden and notice her rubbing her feet on flowers. Curious about this strange behavior, the trio sets out to discover what the butterfly is really doing.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: Signature Painting
programme.desc: Make your name disappear in a game of colored shapes.

programme.title: Panama
programme.desc: Panama City adventure: Explored the iconic Panama Canal, rainforest boat ride, aerial tram above treetops, learned the traditional cumbia dance, and explored the cultural gems of Casco Viejo with local teens. A week of diverse experiences in Central America!

programme.title: The Aral Sea
programme.desc: Kit is rusting in the toxic desert of the former Aral Sea.

programme.title: Water in the City
programme.desc: Mr. Battery is flushed into the city's water pipeline and wastewater system.

programme.title: In your dreams
programme.desc: Carol needs Naomi's signature on a petition to save the local forest, but Naomi hates trees. With Motor's help, Carol goes inside Naomi's dreams to manipulate her desires – or does she?

programme.title: Snot-tacular!
programme.desc: A world champion whistler pops in to help the doctors whistle – and even Billy Bones joins in! And the Cupboard of Everything is on the move again through time, landing in an operating theatre where you wouldn't want to be a patient.

programme.title: The Art of Hair
programme.desc: In Mesopotamia, hair was the source of many beliefs and rules that had to be respected. And if you wanted to look good in society, it was best not to look dishevelled. Fortunately for Howler, the hairdressers of the time were very creative!

programme.title: Hedgehog
programme.desc: Fleabag and Plop fall in love with the baby hedgehog, and Grandad Badger learns more about these spiky little creatures. Tiny Owl does his best to teach Mommy and Daddy about the hedgehog, but they insist that the spiky thing on TV is a hairbrush.

programme.title: Party Like it's 1859
programme.desc: When the team's high-tech dance party is threatened by a power outage, they're frustrated and fly off to find a place where things are still normal. Mistakenly, they end up at a historic village, where they live like it's 150 years ago!

programme.title: Extreme Space
programme.desc: A team of scientists discuss the death of massive stars in the Universe. The aftermath produces some of the brightest and most violent scenes – from supernovas to gamma ray bursts to one of the most intriguing events in the cosmos: black holes.

programme.title: Snot-tacular!
programme.desc: A world champion whistler pops in to help the doctors whistle – and even Billy Bones joins in! And the Cupboard of Everything is on the move again through time, landing in an operating theatre where you wouldn't want to be a patient.

programme.title: We Have a Llama
programme.desc: The kids decide to get a new mascot for the garage. What seemed like a great idea, in theory, proves to be much more difficult in practice.

programme.title: Following In Big Footsteps
programme.desc: The trampoline gymnasts are busy training for a new season of competitions, and for a high-flyer Corey, it looks like this season will be his best yet.

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: E6 - California
programme.desc: The beaches of California are some of the most beautiful in the world, but are they falling out of balance due to mankind’s effects on nature? What does it take for the magnificent fauna of the Pacific Coast to keep living… on the “living beach”?

programme.title: E1 - Trapped at Low Tide
programme.desc: Descend into the tide pool, where a hermit crab house hunts, a baby catshark runs into strange neighbours, and an octopus terrorises prey. Watch seagulls and other creatures hunt on the surface as the heat rises and oxygen depletes in the pool.

programme.title: E3 - In the Extreme
programme.desc: Follow a host of sharks with extraordinary abilities that allow them to thrive in the most adverse conditions around the globe. Observe nearly blind Greenland sharks made for life in freezing Arctic waters, and another species that can walk on land.

programme.title: E6 - California
programme.desc: The beaches of California are some of the most beautiful in the world, but are they falling out of balance due to mankind’s effects on nature? What does it take for the magnificent fauna of the Pacific Coast to keep living… on the “living beach”?

programme.title: E1 - Trapped at Low Tide
programme.desc: Descend into the tide pool, where a hermit crab house hunts, a baby catshark runs into strange neighbours, and an octopus terrorises prey. Watch seagulls and other creatures hunt on the surface as the heat rises and oxygen depletes in the pool.

programme.title: E1 - River of Life
programme.desc: Avoid scaly and feathery dangers with wallabies, see koolamana lizards battle for mates, and feast with crocodile hatchlings. Brave dangerous rapids and understand the cultural and biological importance of a local river as the rainy season arrives.

programme.title: E5 - De Hoop: Place of Hope
programme.desc: This small park makes a big difference to endangered animals. Offering sanctuary to some of the biggest and smallest animals on the planet, witness how species come back from the edge of extinction to reclaim their place in Africa’s wilderness.

programme.title: E6 - Kogelberg
programme.desc: Considered to be the most beautiful of the Cape’s protected areas, Kogelberg Nature Reserve has experienced minimal human interference. Discover the spectacular land and sea life flourishing in this unique botanical wonderland.

programme.title: E6 - The Linear Oasis
programme.desc: Follow the course of South Africa’s Orange river from its origins to where it spills out into the Atlantic Ocean. Along the way we encounter a diverse range of habitats and the creatures they support, from the dry lands of the Richtersveld to the beauty of Augrabies; this is the story of the Linear Oasis. We reveal how life is adapted to survive along its course and discover a rich world of plants and animals.

programme.title: E1 - The Littlest Cub
programme.desc: Get to know Winston, a tiny abandoned cub who imprints on Judy as she nurses him 24-7. Feel the heartbreak as she severs their emotional attachment and teaches this sweet little fellow how to be a grown-up, independent bear in the non-human world.

programme.title: E6 - California
programme.desc: The beaches of California are some of the most beautiful in the world, but are they falling out of balance due to mankind’s effects on nature? What does it take for the magnificent fauna of the Pacific Coast to keep living… on the “living beach”?

programme.title: E6 - The Linear Oasis
programme.desc: Follow the course of South Africa’s Orange river from its origins to where it spills out into the Atlantic Ocean. Along the way we encounter a diverse range of habitats and the creatures they support, from the dry lands of the Richtersveld to the beauty of Augrabies; this is the story of the Linear Oasis. We reveal how life is adapted to survive along its course and discover a rich world of plants and animals.

programme.title: E7 - The Dark Along The Ways
programme.desc: Moiraine and her charges are diverted from their path by an unexpected encounter. This diversion, though, reveals many things - Moiraine's true goal, Lan's past, the fractures that have grown in the group, and the identity of the Dragon Reborn.

programme.title: E7 - The Dark Along The Ways
programme.desc: Moiraine and her charges are diverted from their path by an unexpected encounter. This diversion, though, reveals many things - Moiraine's true goal, Lan's past, the fractures that have grown in the group, and the identity of the Dragon Reborn.

programme.desc: Moiraine and her charges are diverted from their path by an unexpected encounter. This diversion, though, reveals many things - Moiraine's true goal, Lan's past, the fractures that have grown in the group, and the identity of the Dragon Reborn.

programme.title: Adventure of The King
programme.desc: Emperor Zhengde of the Ming Dynasty is young and playful, privately escapes from Palace to avoid the appointed marriage. He loses his memory by accident and luckily comes across Ms. Li to take care him. Prince Ningxia takes this opportunity to rebel the kingdom and catch the emperor to execute him immediately at the execution ground. At a critical time, three entourages rescue the Emperor and the prince Ningxia is arrested. However, Ms Li has refused to get marriage with the emperor due to his cheating on her love feelings.

programme.title: Triangle
programme.desc: Life has not been kind to Sam, Fai and Mok as they struggle to make ends meet. Routine visits to bars seem to be their only way out of miseries. Until a stormy evening when a mysterious old man appears before them with a tip: An ancient treasure is buried under the high-security Legislative Building. All they have to do is sneak in and retrieve it; if they believe in his story. Sam, Fai and Mok agree to make a run for the treasure to test their fate. What they uncover is beyond anything they expected: An ancient coffin containing a ceremonial robe made of gold...

programme.title: Crayon Shinchan the Movie: My Moving Story Cactus Attack
programme.desc: Hiroshi was ordered to collect the fruit of cactus and was transferred to Mexico. So, Nohara family had to move to Mexico and live there. They had to bid farewell to their acquaintances and the citizens of Kasukabe with tears. Shinnosuke heard that Mexican young girls are stylish and beautiful and became eager for this journey. On arriving at Madakueruyobaka city in Mexico, a new life full of anxiety, surrounded by unique neighbors awaits them. But Shinnosuke and Nohara family had no idea that flesh-eating killer cacti are going to attack.

programme.title: Baogu Produces -The Frontline of Cold War
programme.desc: The long-awaited “Cold War” series returns! Director Longman Leung together with Terrance Lau and Louise Wong disclose the untold stories of filming “Cold War 1994”. While Terrance reveals filming car chase scenes had been his brush with death, Louise confesses to being stressed to play the role of a gang boss for the first time that took her three months of preparation for the action scenes. Longman also shares about the tycoon kidnapping case in the film inspired by real cases from the 1990s......

programme.title: Chingay : Asia's Largest Street Performance
programme.desc: Singapore and Malaysia have jointly nominated the Chingay Parade for UNESCO's Intangible Cultural Heritage list. What does that mean for the annual spectacle held in Singapore, JB and George Town?

programme.title: E15 - Breakout In Plain Sight
programme.desc: An Iranian American psychopath is thrown into city jail in Southern California. Before he gets sent to a higher security prison, he escapes by crawling up the plumbing chase of the five-story prison.

programme.title: E15 - Astonishing Escapes
programme.desc: We've heard the tales of prison breaks, but these aren't your average escapes. From a man who frees himself all thanks to a fruit to a Soviet pilot that evades capture by stealing the enemy's plane.

programme.title: E606 - Jumpin' Jake Flash
programme.desc: A set of replica Muppets has Chum feeling green with envy; but will going gonzo over these land him the goods? Meanwhile, Rick flips over an autograph book from the 1800s, but are the signatures the real?

programme.title: E388 - Wolfemen Vs. The Automatons
programme.desc: The competitive pinball-wizard Wolfe brothers meet coin-op king Dirk at his giant poultry barn turned private arcade. Mike and Robbie enter a hangar full of ultra-rare games and choice carnival relics.

programme.title: E42 - American Spirits
programme.desc: Two entrepreneurs rise from the ashes of Prohibition by staking everything on two liquors and go on to save an industry, change cocktail culture, and create two of the most popular brands in the country.

programme.title: E6 - Calm Songs & Sweet Dreams!
programme.desc: Join Twinkle for some fun adventures & sleepy songs! First, help Twinkle find Sandy the Seagull while learning what sounds a pig, duck & cow make along the way! Then, Bunny leads Twinkle on an exciting adventure into the forest to find a mysterious box. After a long day of playing, it's time for some sleepy songs. Listen as Mr. Moon sings a soothing lullaby to help Twinkle drift off to sleep for a peaceful night's rest.

programme.title: E1 - So Many Fun Things to Discover!
programme.desc: There are so many fun things to discover with Mia, Max & their friends! First, they head to the park for some rolling fun as they play Jack & Jill, rolling down the muddy grass & whizzing down the slide! Then, Max gets his first sippy cup & is so excited to show it off that he starts an impromptu tea party with all his playmates. The day of discovery ends with a rainy day competition to see who can make the biggest puddle splash of all!

programme.title: E2 - When Everything Goes Hilariously Wrong!
programme.desc: Get ready to laugh as everything goes hilariously wrong for Kii & Yii & their friends! The chaos starts when Robot creates a jelly-making machine, but it goes haywire & he ends up stuck inside a giant wobbly jelly! Then, Princess Cat puts way too much soap in her washing machine, causing it to overflow & fill her entire castle with bubbles! From a wobbly tooth to a picky eater, it's one funny problem after another!

programme.title: E3 - How Does JJ Like to Play?
programme.desc: Find out all the fun ways JJ likes to play! First, join JJ, TomTom & YoYo as they spend the day indoors pretending to be doctors & nurses. Then, the fun continues outside! When the kids get restless at a family barbecue, they play a fun game of 'Simon Says.' On another adventure, experienced scouts TomTom & YoYo take JJ under their wing & show him how to do classic outdoor camping activities. From racing grocery carts to a doggy playdate, JJ loves to play!

programme.title: E2 - The Whole Crew to the Rescue!
programme.desc: It's the whole crew to the rescue in these amazing adventures! When Kat doesn't know a car's throttle is stuck, she goes for a test drive & is soon out of control, forcing Grandma & Gecko to rescue her! Then, when a beach trip is cancelled because Tilly the Tow Truck breaks down, Trevor helps with a tow & then delivers a load of sand to create a surprise beach right at the garage! Plus, the whole crew jumps into action when Blue gets stranded alone down a steep bank.

programme.title: E3 - Let's Get Curious & Creative!
programme.desc: It's time for Blippi to get curious & creative! A mysterious book appears in the clubhouse, & when Blippi opens it, the brand-new Curiosity Crew jumps out! After helping the crew figure out what they're looking for (popsicles!), Blippi & Meekah join them on some creative adventures. They learn all about how to mix colors to make a beautiful rainbow painting, shrink down to dance with Bendjamin the Klutz & ride a library cart on a hunt for books about dinosaurs!

programme.title: E1 - Battling Evil Robots & Racing Villains!
programme.desc: Get ready for an action-packed day of battling evil robots & racing villains! First, the new & improved Robofreeze becomes faulty, & Mila & Morphle must help Officer Freeze retrieve the remote to turn him off! Then, it's time for the Pet Port Rally, but naughty Winston cheats by using sneaky devices to slow everyone down. The chaos continues as two Robofreezes turn evil & multiply, & a lightning strike turns another one into a super-powered menace!

programme.title: E4 - A Fun Day of Games & Construction
programme.desc: Get ready for playground games & construction fun! First, the crew has to build a crazy golf course! After they finish, they decide to try it out, but something goes wrong every time! Then, at the beach, Digley & Dazey challenge each other to a sandcastle competition. They each build castles that get bigger & sillier, & after some bickering, they decide to build one giant castle together! Plus, learn the alphabet & sing 'If You're Happy & You Know It'!

programme.title: E1 - Colors, Shapes & Numbers!
programme.desc: It's time to learn all about colors, shapes & numbers with Twinkle! First, learn how to count with Twinkle as she finds five balloons in the colors red, blue, green, yellow & purple! Then, join Twinkle & Sandy the Seagull to make sandcastles, learning different shapes like squares, triangles & circles. The learning continues as Twinkle & her friends build & count a beautiful tower of rainbow stones & discover the variety of shapes that clouds can take in the sky!

programme.title: E2 - When Everything Goes Hilariously Wrong!
programme.desc: Get ready to laugh as everything goes hilariously wrong for Kii & Yii & their friends! The chaos starts when Robot creates a jelly-making machine, but it goes haywire & he ends up stuck inside a giant wobbly jelly! Then, Princess Cat puts way too much soap in her washing machine, causing it to overflow & fill her entire castle with bubbles! From a wobbly tooth to a picky eater, it's one funny problem after another!

Listen as Mr. Moon sings a soothing lullaby to help Twinkle drift off to sleep for a peaceful night's rest.

programme.title: E1 - Battling Evil Robots & Racing Villains!
programme.desc: Get ready for an action-packed day of battling evil robots & racing villains! First, the new & improved Robofreeze becomes faulty, & Mila & Morphle must help Officer Freeze retrieve the remote to turn him off! Then, it's time for the Pet Port Rally, but naughty Winston cheats by using sneaky devices to slow everyone down. The chaos continues as two Robofreezes turn evil & multiply, & a lightning strike turns another one into a super-powered menace!

programme.title: E10 - Saudi Arabia's Reality Check
programme.desc: The US and Israel's war against Iran could not have come at a worse time for Saudi Arabia. The region's instability is impacting a multi-trillion dollar economic and social transformation underway in the Kingdom.

programme.title: Ikaw Palang Ang Minahal
programme.desc: Adela, a shy and emotionally neglected young woman raised by a cold, domineering father, experiences love for the first time when the charming David courts her. As their romance deepens, Adela's father becomes convinced that David is motivated by wealth rather than love. The film explores betrayal, self‑worth, and emotional awakening as Adela confronts painful truths and learns to reclaim her dignity and independence

E4 - 蘇慧倫蘇醒掀回憶殺
programme.desc: 在音樂主題上再度突破，以「一路為伍，向生綻放」為主題，甄選了貼近生活的歌曲和作品，用歌聲傳遞正能量；邀請了A-Lin、大張偉、庾澄慶、馬嘉祺、光良、蘇慧玲、任賢齊、陳卓璇、曾比特、白舉綱、吳莫愁等老、中、青三代歌手，在全新升級的「盲選配對」模式中組合獻唱，在代際傳承、時代交融中突破自我，打造一場最溫暖、最動人的音樂盛宴。

programme.title: E15 - 同頻比心動更重要
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》回歸經典規則。男嘉賓登場後，將通過「愛之請回答」「愛之再判斷」「愛之終決選」三個環節與24位女嘉賓互相了解，還有根據大數據匹配的「智推女生」參與最終決選。陳銘、黃瀾加盟「非誠合夥人」，以全新視角解讀愛情。

programme.title: E26
programme.desc: 延續上一季，現代人王衡與西漢海昏侯劉賀再度聯手，他們的足跡從長安延伸至豫章，並深入民間；探討他們如何運用現代思維應對宮廷權謀與民間疾苦，在面對地方積弊和幕後黑手的過程中相互砥礪，並努力改寫歷史。

programme.title: E3 - 高瀚宇周震南再現頂流捧臉殺
programme.desc: 30組新銳潮玩設計師帶著自己的原創IP，與高瀚宇、何廣智、賴美雲、謝可寅、周揚青、周震南組成3組潮玩工作室，經歷一系列主題創作，在創意與設計中不斷挑戰自我、團結協作，用繪畫表達語言，賦予這些潮流新興IP更具生命力的藝術價值，也讓更多「隱藏款」原創IP和寶藏設計師被看到。

programme.title: E26
programme.desc: 延續上一季，現代人王衡與西漢海昏侯劉賀再度聯手，他們的足跡從長安延伸至豫章，並深入民間；探討他們如何運用現代思維應對宮廷權謀與民間疾苦，在面對地方積弊和幕後黑手的過程中相互砥礪，並努力改寫歷史。

programme.title: E1 - 好兄弟邀我回舊司
programme.desc: 節目全新升級，以「老友季」作為主題，把觀察樣本聚焦在情感更濃、羈絆更深的職場戰友身上，對職場上下級關系的維度進行了深度開拓；通過職場老友這一切面，去探討職場中更復雜的問題解法。

Takeuchi Yuki: Falling For The Married Woman

Shanghai Grand
programme.desc: The Taiwan military officer, Hsu falls into the enemy's ambush, and floats to the Shanghai shore where he is saved by Ting Lik. Lik teams up with Kueng to try to make a fortune and soon they become famous in Shanghai. The Shanghai tycoon Fung try to eliminate other opponents with the help of Hsu and Lik. Later, Hsu discovers Fung is the mastermind of the ambush that killed all his fellow officials...

programme.title: Warrior Mothers: It's A Mad Mad Mad World
programme.desc: News reporter Bill and his wife live in a public housing flat with their 3 daughters. Their dream is to get rich someday. When Lady Luck comes knocking on their door one day and they win the first prize of the local lottery, Mark Six, all hell break loose...

programme.title: The Secret Of NIMH
programme.desc: A widowed mouse lives with her children on a farm. When her son falls ill, she sets out to seek the aid of a colony of super-intelligent rats, with whom she has a deeper link.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: Barclays WSL '25/26 E62 -Leicester City v Chelsea
Never Say Die
programme.desc: Never Say Die follows Joey Delgado (Jillian Ward), a principled IT student who runs a vlog spotlighting the quiet heroism of honest police officers-inspired by her father, Major Julio Delgado (Raymart Santiago). Her views are challenged when a viral expose by Andrew Dizon (David Licauco), a sharp and cynical investigative vlogger, paints her father as corrupt and gets him suspended. The expose shatters the home she so carefully nurtured and blames Andrew.
